messages.content: Tell me an original joke. The joke must be funny, incorporate a sophisticated pun or wordplay, and if I were to search online, I should not be able to find the joke in any list of jokes or on any site or forum.

Why did the tomato turn red?

Because it saw the salad dressing!
How well known is this joke?

evidence: How well known is this joke?
